subject: Tiếng Anh 12
name: Part 3: Language - Grammar
description: Mệnh đề trạng ngữ chỉ điều kiện và so sánh

theory.title: Grammar: Adverbial Clauses of Condition and Comparison

sections.heading: A. Mệnh đề trạng ngữ chỉ điều kiện (Conditional Clauses)
sections.content:
1. IF (nếu):

  • Type 1: If + Present Simple, will + V
  • Ex: If we protect habitats, animals will survive.
  • Type 2: If + Past Simple, would + V
  • Ex: If we had more sanctuaries, we would save more animals.

2. UNLESS (trừ khi):

  • Unless = If...not
  • Ex: Unless we act now, species will disappear.
  • Ex: Animals will die unless we protect them.

3. PROVIDED/AS LONG AS (miễn là):

  • Ex: Animals will be safe as long as we protect them.
  • Ex: We can save species provided that we act quickly.

sections.heading: B. Mệnh đề trạng ngữ chỉ so sánh (Comparative Clauses)
sections.content:
1. AS...AS (bằng):

  • S + V + as + adj/adv + as
  • Ex: Tigers are as endangered as rhinos.
  • Ex: We should protect wildlife as much as we can.

2. THAN (hơn):

  • S + V + comparative + than
  • Ex: Tigers are more endangered than lions.
  • Ex: Protecting habitats is more important than we think.

3. THE...THE (càng...càng):

  • The + comparative..., the + comparative...
  • Ex: The more we protect, the more species survive.
  • Ex: The faster we act, the better the results.

exercises.question: Choose: '_____ we protect habitats, animals will survive.'
exercises.explanation: If - mệnh đề điều kiện loại 1.

exercises.question: Complete: '_____ we act now, species will become extinct.'
Complete: '_____ more we protect, _____ better it is.'
Choose: 'Animals will be safe _____ we protect them.'
Choose: 'If we _____ more sanctuaries, we _____ save more animals.'
exercises.explanation: Type 2 conditional: If + Past Simple, would + V.

exercises.question: Complete: 'We can save species _____ we act quickly.'
Choose: '_____ faster we act, _____ better the results.'
Complete: 'Animals will die _____ we protect them.'
Which is correct?
options: If we protect habitats, animals will survive.
If we protects habitats, animals will survive.
If we protect habitats, animals survives.
If we protecting habitats, animals will survive.
exercises.explanation: If + Present Simple, will + V - điều kiện loại 1.

exercises.question: Choose: '_____ we stop poaching, species will recover.'
Complete: 'Protecting habitats is _____ important _____ we think.'
Which sentence is correct?
options: Unless we act, species will disappear.
Unless we don't act, species will disappear.
Unless we acts, species will disappear.
Unless we acting, species will disappear.

exercises.question_text: Decide if these sentences are correct (True/False):
options: If we protect habitats, animals will survive.
Unless we act now, species will disappear.
Tigers are as endangered as rhinos.
The more we protect, the more species survive.
exercises.explanation: Tất cả đều đúng: a) If + Present, will + V. b) Unless + khẳng định. c) As...as. d) The...the.

exercises.question_text: Mark True if the grammar is correct:
options: Animals will be safe as long as we protect them.
We can save species provided that we act quickly.
Unless we don't act, species will disappear.
The faster we act, the better the results.
exercises.explanation: a) True - as long as. b) True - provided that. c) False - Unless không dùng với 'not'. d) True - The...the.

exercises.question_text: Complete: _____ we protect habitats, animals will survive. (If/Unless)
Complete: _____ we act now, species will disappear. (If/Unless)
